_comment: Single source for UI color literals that BOTH the node suite (tests/layout_url.test.js) and the Selenium suite (tests/test_browser_layout.py) pin. Each value is validated against its real origin (a 00_tokens_base.css token or a JS source literal) by test_ui_pins_match_sources so this file cannot silently drift from what ships. Add a pin here instead of hardcoding the hex in two test layers.
